## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss KT's potential role at growthx.ai and address timing concerns related to her possible surgery.](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [KT is still interested in joining growthx.ai but has concerns about potential hip surgery timing](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Marcel emphasized the company's flexibility, including unlimited vacation policy and potential role adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [growthx.ai is rapidly expanding, bringing on high-profile team members like Matthew Panzarino (ex-TechCrunch) as Chief Content Officer](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [The company is positioning itself as "client zero," implementing strategies internally before offering them to customers](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### KT's Health Situation and Timing Concerns

  - [KT has a potential hip surgery due to an athletic injury](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Main concern: not wanting to start and then take time off or underperform](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Marcel offered flexibility on start date and role adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [KT suggested extending the start date pending surgeon's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Marcel to provide an update on Thursday after a board meeting](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)

### growthx.ai's Team Expansion

  - [Recent hires include Mara and Carrie, whom KT knows and respects](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Matthew Panzarino, former editor-in-chief of TechCrunch (10-year tenure), joined as Chief Content Officer](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Kyle, first customer and former pod manager, moving to sales role](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Jason now VP of GoToMarket](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Company Culture and Benefits

  - [Unlimited vacation policy](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Flexible work arrangements and role adjustments offered](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Strong insurance benefits available for W-2 employees](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)

### growthx.ai's Strategic Direction

  - [Positioning as "client zero" - implementing strategies internally before offering to customers](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Plans for in-house publications and experimental content](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Aim to allocate 10% of employee bandwidth for creative, experimental projects](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Leveraging team's diverse backgrounds (e.g., KT's writing experience) for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to update KT on Thursday after the board meeting](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [KT to inform Marcel once she has a definitive answer about the surgery](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Potential discussion on role adjustments and start date extension](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [KT to consider reconnecting with other team members (e.g., Kyle, Matthew) if interested](https://fathom.video/share/VEQWon_MH3C8ubY21bEDpJc9H_DKd-on?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
